# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

```ruby
# app/views/posts/_post.html.erb

<div id="post-<%= raw(post.id) %>" class="row post medium lightgray border radius10 px3 py4 mt5 br2 shadow bgwhite w8 hm flex items center justifycenter lh1_ns bw1 thin pad4 zn pa6 ma2 " style="" data-test='postDataTestId <%= raw(post.id) %> '> <!-- begin post --> 
  <div class="col s3 mr5 pt0 pr8 hoverblack bgwhite br bw1 thin pad4 zn pa6 ma2 " style="" data-test='userDataTestId <%= raw(post.id) %> '> <!-- begin user --> 
    <div class="row center w75 s3 mxauto pt0 py8 relative bgwhite br bw1 thin pad4 zn pa6 ma2 " style="" data-test='userProfileImageDataTestId <%= raw(post.id) %> '> <!-- begin user profile image --> 
      <div class="col s3 mxauto py8 pt0 relative bgwhite br bw1 thin pad4 zn pa6 ma2 " style="" data-test='userProfileImageTestId <%= raw(post.id) %> '> <!-- begin user profile image --> 
        <img src ="<%=  Rails.application.routes.url_helpers.image_path post, only: :thumb  if post .photos?   %} " alt="" class=' img-responsive center'/></div>  <-- end thumbnail photo for user --> 
      <p data-test = 'userNameTestId <%=  raw(post.id) %> <!-- begin username with a link to profile page  (when logged in)-- > 	  	<a href='<%== Rails .routes助手。url_for id: "profiles/show" , only_path : false, post: Post '>profile <span class =”caret-up caret lightgreen right small blue circle dib ml1 alignleft pb2 br bw1 thin pad4 zn pa6 ma2 “><%== raw(post.id) %> </a> 
    <p data - test='userCreatedTestId <%=  Rails .routes助手。url_for id: "profiles /show" , only _ path : false, post;>created at<span class =”caret-up caret lightgreen right small blue circle dib ml1 alignleft pb2 br bw1 thin pad4 zn pa6 ma
